query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, loredexEntryId, era, season, disciplines, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('evt-trojan-downfall-90017', 'Operation Trojan Downfall', 'event', 'epic', 'chaos', 'air', 'probability', 'none', 'unknown', 'Insurgency', 5, 0, 0, 'Covert Infiltration: Choose an enemy location. Destroy it and deal 3 damage to all characters there. Inside Job: If you control The Engineer or Agent Zero, this card costs 2 less to play.', '"The greatest fortress falls not from without, but from within."', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/operation_trojan_downfall-GhG3a3pLavDLQZDnXjocpk.png', 'entity_103', 'Age of Privacy', 'Season 1', '["Espionage", "Sabotage", "Infiltration"]', '["covert", "destroy-location", "cost-reduction", "sabotage"]', 'story', 1);
